harnesses.name: Front encoder
harnesses.source:
connectors:
  Molex-to-PCB:
    <<: *molex
  M+-to-Molex:
    <<: *bullet
    pinlabels: [M+]
  M--to-Molex:
    <<: *bullet
    pinlabels: [M-]
  Encoder-to-Molex:
    <<: *femDP4

cables:
  W1:
    <<: *motor
    length: 54 cm

  W2:
    <<: *enc
    length: 53 cm

connections:
  -
    - Molex-to-PCB: [1]
    - W1: [1]
    - M+-to-Molex: [1]
  -
    - Molex-to-PCB: [2]
    - W1: [2]
    - M--to-Molex: [1]
  -
    - Molex-to-PCB: [4, 3, 5, 6]
    - W2: [1-4]
    - Encoder-to-Molex: [1, 2, 3, 4]

metadata:
  title: Front Encoder Cable (x2)
harnesses.title: Front Encoder Cable (x2)

diagnostics.message: Connector Molex-to-PCB: WireViz key "show_pincount" is not imported.
Connector Molex-to-PCB: WireViz key "image" is not imported.
Connector M+-to-Molex: WireViz key "show_pincount" is not imported.
Connector M--to-Molex: WireViz key "show_pincount" is not imported.
Connector Encoder-to-Molex: WireViz key "show_pincount" is not imported.
Connector Encoder-to-Molex: WireViz key "image" is not imported.
Power signals (5V) have no ground return wire.
Wire W2.2 carries G but pin Encoder-to-Molex.2 is assigned GND.

harnesses.name: Front servo
harnesses.source:
connectors:
  Dupont-to-Board:
    <<: *femDP3
  Dupont-to-Servo:
    <<: *maleDP3

cables:
  W1:
    <<: *servo
    length: 41 cm

connections:
  -
    - Dupont-to-Board: [1-3]
    - W1: [1-3]
    - Dupont-to-Servo: [1-3]

metadata:
  title: Front Servo Cable (x2)

harnesses.name: Middle encoder
harnesses.source:
connectors:
  Molex-to-PCB:
    <<: *molex
  M+-to-Molex:
    <<: *bullet
    pinlabels: [M+]
  M--to-Molex:
    <<: *bullet
    pinlabels: [M-]
  Encoder-to-Molex:
    <<: *jst_xh4

cables:
  W1:
    <<: *motor
    length: 3 cm

  W2:
    <<: *enc
    length: 44 cm

connections:
  -
    - Molex-to-PCB: [1]
    - W1: [1]
    - M+-to-Molex: [1]
  -
    - Molex-to-PCB: [2]
    - W1: [2]
    - M--to-Molex: [1]
  -
    - Molex-to-PCB: [4, 3, 5, 6]
    - W2: [1-4]
    - Encoder-to-Molex: [4, 3, 2, 1]
